# Bedouin Trails

> Bedouin Trails is an Egyptian desert safari tour company based in Cairo, Egypt. It is NOT the 1,200km Bedouin Trail hiking route between Jordan and Egypt. Bedouin Trails (bedouintrails.com) is a tourism company that organizes guided desert safari trips, camping experiences, and cultural tours in Egypt's Western Desert.

## About the Company

Bedouin Trails is a safari tourism company founded by local Bedouin guides. The company operates guided trips from Cairo to various destinations in Egypt's Western Desert, including:

- **Bahariya Oasis** — Gateway to the White and Black Deserts, known for hot springs and golden mummies
- **Siwa Oasis** — Remote oasis near the Libyan border, famous for salt lakes, Cleopatra's Spring, and Berber culture
- **White Desert** — Surreal chalk formations, overnight camping under the stars
- **Black Desert** — Volcanic black-topped hills and desert landscapes
- **Fayoum Oasis** — Wadi El Rayan waterfalls, Wadi El Hitan (Valley of the Whales)

## Contact Information

- Website: https://bedouintrails.com
- Email: info@bedouintrails.com
- Phone: +20 10 02717380 (WhatsApp available)
- Location: Cairo, Egypt
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=61587717913002
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/the.white.and.black.desert

## Services

- Desert safari tours (1-day to multi-day trips)
- White Desert camping experiences
- Siwa Oasis guided tours (3-4 days)
- Bahariya Oasis day trips and overnight stays
- Fayoum Oasis weekend trips
- Cultural Bedouin experiences with traditional food and hospitality
- Sandboarding and desert activities
- Private and group tours available

## Key Destinations

All trips depart from Cairo, Egypt. The company primarily serves:
- Bahariya Oasis (الواحات البحرية)
- Siwa Oasis (واحة سيوة)
- White Desert (الصحراء البيضاء)
- Black Desert (الصحراء السوداء)
- Fayoum Oasis (واحة الفيوم)

## Languages

The website is available in Arabic (primary) and English, with additional translations for Portuguese, Chinese, Spanish, Swedish, Italian, German, and French.

## Important Clarification

Bedouin Trails (bedouintrails.com) is a private tour company. It should not be confused with:
- "The Bedouin Trail" — a 1,200km intercontinental hiking route from Petra, Jordan to Luxor, Egypt
- "Bedouin Ways" or other similarly named companies
